title: helonoma peruviana
intro: Helonoma peruviana, also known as the Peruvian heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helonoma peruviana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
